risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to lack of alignment keys.
risk.mit: Add alignment keys to the interstage and module joints.

risk.desc: Risk of strain relief failure if cables are not routed with proper support.
risk.mit: Ensure every cable exit shows strain relief geometry and respects minimum bend radius.

risk.desc: Risk of improper mating if connectors are not labeled or keyed.
risk.mit: Label connectors and ensure they are reachable without disassembling structure.

risk.desc: Risk of assembly errors if the assembly sequence is not clearly defined.
risk.mit: Define a clear assembly sequence with tool, torque, and datum per step.

risk.desc: Risk of overclaiming the display model as a functional propulsion system.
risk.mit: Ensure all documentation clearly states the display model is non-functional.

Validate assembly order for repeatable and error-free assembly.

risk.desc: The bolt_circle_dummy may not provide sufficient preload for the removable module interface.
risk.mit: Increase the number of bolts or use a higher preload torque.

risk.desc: The cutaway_window may be too small for full educational access.
risk.mit: Increase the size of the cutaway_window or add additional access points.

risk.desc: The bell_nozzle_shell may not be robust enough for handling loads.
risk.mit: Increase the wall thickness or use a stronger material for the bell_nozzle_shell.

risk.desc: The engine_display_cartridge may not fit properly due to manufacturing tolerances.
risk.mit: Adjust the fit_class and stack_up_mm to ensure proper fit.

risk.desc: The turbopump_assembly_dummy may not provide accurate load simulation.
risk.mit: Improve the design of the turbopump_assembly_dummy to better simulate real loads.

Thermal conduction from display dummy to ambient air
Structural load transfer from hinge to deploy door

adjacent_interfaces.assembly_order_hint: Attach to recovery bay module before deploy door assembly
Install hinge on deploy door before door attachment
Insert label into bay label pocket

manufacturing_strategy.support: orientation: vertical, inspection: visual and CMM

generated_parts.label: Integration Inspection Ring

requirements: Integration_inspection_ring with assembly_datum pads, inspection_window, checklist_callout, connection type labels, load-path closure marks
Assembly order evidence, inspection windows, readiness checklist hooks, connection types and load-path closure
Verification of material properties, inspection windows, and assembly sequence

verify.value: All required fields and structures are present.
verify.rule: Ensure all specified fields and structures are included in the design brief.
Ensure the mass estimate is within the expected range for the subsystem.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.
verify.rule: Ensure P0 internal_feature_targets are mapped to geometry_ops.

verify.value: All interfaces are named with exact neighboring subsystem labels, connection_type, DOF, clearance, and required_feature.
verify.rule: Ensure interfaces are reciprocal with neighboring subsystems.

verify.value: Critical joints have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.
verify.rule: Ensure critical joints have visible locking/preload evidence.
Ensure boundary conditions are defined for downstream CFD/FEA.

risk.desc: Blocked access to inspection windows during assembly.
risk.mit: Ensure inspection windows are not obstructed by adjacent parts.

risk.desc: Weak interface at the connection between the inspection ring and interstage structure.
risk.mit: Use a higher strength connection type or add reinforcement.

risk.desc: Tolerance mismatch between the inspection ring and avionics bay interfaces.
risk.mit: Review and adjust tolerances to ensure proper fit.

risk.desc: Process limitations in LPBF and CFRP layup may affect structural integrity.
risk.mit: Conduct additional testing to validate the manufacturing process.

risk.desc: Overclaiming of inspection and readiness checklist features leading to false assurance.
risk.mit: Verify that all checklist items are feasible and inspections are thorough.

manufacturing_strategy.inspection: visual and tactile inspection for alignment and fit
